requirement_topic.en: Refrigerator Energy Performance — MEPE / Myanmar Energy Programmes
requirement_topic.zh: 冰箱能效——MEPE / 缅甸能源计划
requirement_topic.zht: 冰箱能效——MEPE / 緬甸能源計劃

summary.en: Myanmar electricity authorities, including MEPE-linked programmes, have energy-efficiency policy activity, but a fully confirmed mandatory refrigerator MEPS and label equivalent to China's refrigerator energy label should be verified model by model and channel by channel. Importers should still prepare annual energy-consumption data, rated volume, climate class, test-method references, and product labels because government procurement, utilities, and large retailers may request energy evidence even where a universal market-entry label is not confirmed. Refrigerator energy files should be consistent with Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz operating conditions.
summary.zh: 缅甸电力主管体系（包括与 MEPE 相关的计划）存在能效政策活动，但是否存在完全确认的强制性冰箱 MEPS 和等同于中国冰箱能效标签的制度，应按型号和渠道逐项核验。进口商仍应准备年耗电量、额定容积、气候类型、试验方法引用和产品标签资料，因为即使尚未确认统一市场准入标签，政府采购、公用事业单位和大型零售商也可能要求能效证据。冰箱能效文件应与缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 使用条件一致。
summary.zht: 緬甸電力主管體系（包括與 MEPE 相關的計劃）存在能效政策活動，但是否存在完全確認的強制性冰箱 MEPS 和等同於中國冰箱能效標籤的制度，應按型號和渠道逐項核驗。進口商仍應準備年耗電量、額定容積、氣候類型、試驗方法引用和產品標籤資料，因為即使尚未確認統一市場准入標籤，政府採購、公用事業單位和大型零售商也可能要求能效證據。冰箱能效文件應與緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 使用條件一致。

standards_or_laws: MEPE / Myanmar electricity-sector energy-efficiency programmes — confirm current appliance coverage
MSTRD MS standards aligned with IEC refrigerator test methods where adopted — voluntary unless required by programme, procurement, or customs channel

summary.en: China refrigerator energy compliance uses GB 12021.2 as the common baseline for minimum allowable energy efficiency values and energy-efficiency grades, alongside GB 4706.13 for appliance safety. China Energy Label documentation is China-specific and does not by itself establish a Myanmar energy-label approval.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱能效合规以 GB 12021.2 作为耗电量限定值和能效等级的通用基线，并以 GB 4706.13 作为电器安全基线。中国能效标识文件属于中国制度本身，不能单独构成缅甸能效标签批准。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱能效合規以 GB 12021.2 作為耗電量限定值和能效等級的通用基線，並以 GB 4706.13 作為電器安全基線。中國能效標識文件屬於中國制度本身，不能單獨構成緬甸能效標籤批准。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators
GB 4706.13 — Safety baseline for household refrigerating appliances

gap.en: The practical gap is uncertainty and documentation alignment, not an automatic redesign requirement. China GB 12021.2 grades should be translated into neutral performance data rather than presented as Myanmar approval. Verify whether MEPE, a procurement tender, or the import channel requires a specific energy declaration, label artwork, or test method. Also verify that energy testing and labels cover 230 V operation, because Myanmar's nominal voltage differs from China's 220/380 V baseline while sharing 50 Hz frequency.
gap.zh: 实际差距在于不确定性和文件映射，而非自动要求重新设计。中国 GB 12021.2 等级应转换为中性的性能数据，而不应表述为缅甸批准。应核验 MEPE、采购招标或进口渠道是否要求特定能效声明、标签图样或测试方法。还应核验能效测试和标签是否覆盖 230 V 运行，因为缅甸额定电压不同于中国 220/380 V 基线，但同为 50 Hz。
gap.zht: 實際差距在於不確定性和文件映射，而非自動要求重新設計。中國 GB 12021.2 等級應轉換為中性的性能數據，而不應表述為緬甸批准。應核驗 MEPE、採購招標或進口渠道是否要求特定能效聲明、標籤圖樣或測試方法。還應核驗能效測試和標籤是否覆蓋 230 V 運行，因為緬甸額定電壓不同於中國 220/380 V 基線，但同為 50 Hz。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-dependent / verify — MEPE-linked energy evidence may be requested, but a universal mandatory refrigerator label should be confirmed for the exact product and import channel
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 and China Energy Label apply to covered household refrigerators in China

source.publisher: Ministry of Electric Power / electricity-sector authorities, Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Myanmar refrigerator energy compliance as a programme and buyer-documentation issue until the exact MEPE or import-channel obligation is verified. Do not present China GB 12021.2 grades as Myanmar approval; provide annual consumption, rated volume, test basis, and 230 V / 50 Hz suitability evidence.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在核实现行 MEPE 或进口渠道义务前，应将缅甸冰箱能效合规视为计划及采购方文件问题。不要把中国 GB 12021.2 等级表述为缅甸批准；应提供年耗电量、额定容积、测试依据及 230 V / 50 Hz 适配证据。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在核實現行 MEPE 或進口渠道義務前，應將緬甸冰箱能效合規視為計劃及採購方文件問題。不要把中國 GB 12021.2 等級表述為緬甸批准；應提供年耗電量、額定容積、測試依據及 230 V / 50 Hz 適配證據。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Voltage and Frequency — 230 V / 50 Hz Myanmar Operation
requirement_topic.zh: 电网电压及频率——缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 运行
requirement_topic.zht: 電網電壓及頻率——緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 運行

summary.en: Myanmar's nominal household supply is 230 V, 50 Hz. The frequency matches China at 50 Hz, but the nominal voltage differs from China's common 220 V single-phase and 380 V three-phase baseline. Household refrigerators exported to Myanmar should have nameplates, compressors, control boards, plugs, cords, and protection devices rated for 230 V operation and local installation practice. If the product is labelled only 220 V, the importer should obtain engineering confirmation that the rated voltage range safely covers 230 V and local voltage fluctuation conditions.
summary.zh: 缅甸家用供电标称值为 230 V、50 Hz。频率与中国同为 50 Hz，但额定电压不同于中国常见 220 V 单相和 380 V 三相基线。出口缅甸的家用冰箱，其铭牌、压缩机、控制板、插头、电源线和保护装置应覆盖 230 V 运行及当地安装实践。如产品仅标注 220 V，进口商应取得工程确认，证明额定电压范围可安全覆盖 230 V 及当地电压波动条件。
summary.zht: 緬甸家用供電標稱值為 230 V、50 Hz。頻率與中國同為 50 Hz，但額定電壓不同於中國常見 220 V 單相和 380 V 三相基線。出口緬甸的家用冰箱，其銘牌、壓縮機、控制板、插頭、電源線和保護裝置應覆蓋 230 V 運行及當地安裝實踐。如產品僅標注 220 V，進口商應取得工程確認，證明額定電壓範圍可安全覆蓋 230 V 及當地電壓波動條件。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar nominal supply condition — 230 V / 50 Hz for household appliances
MEPE distribution practice and local installation requirements — verify with importer and utility connection context

summary.en: China refrigerator designs commonly use the China domestic electrical baseline, with safety evidence under GB 4706.13 and energy evidence under GB 12021.2. China single-phase household ratings are commonly 220 V / 50 Hz, and three-phase distribution is commonly 380 V / 50 Hz; that baseline is close but not identical to Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz condition.
summary.zh: 中国冰箱设计通常采用中国国内电气基线，安全证据依据 GB 4706.13，能效证据依据 GB 12021.2。中国单相家用额定值通常为 220 V / 50 Hz，三相配电通常为 380 V / 50 Hz；该基线接近但不等同于缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 条件。
summary.zht: 中國冰箱設計通常採用中國國內電氣基線，安全證據依據 GB 4706.13，能效證據依據 GB 12021.2。中國單相家用額定值通常為 220 V / 50 Hz，三相配電通常為 380 V / 50 Hz；該基線接近但不等同於緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 條件。

standards_or_laws: GB 4706.13 — appliance safety baseline for household refrigerating appliances

gap.en: This is a narrow but practical electrical-fit gap. A refrigerator already rated 220-240 V / 50 Hz is normally easier to document for Myanmar than a model labelled only 220 V. The importer should align nameplate voltage, user manual, test-report conditions, plug or cord set, and warranty assumptions with Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz grid before shipment.
gap.zh: 这是一个范围较窄但实际重要的电气适配差距。已标注 220-240 V / 50 Hz 的冰箱通常比仅标注 220 V 的型号更容易为缅甸准备文件。进口商应在出货前使铭牌电压、说明书、检测报告条件、插头或电源线组以及质保假设与缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 电网一致。
gap.zht: 這是一個範圍較窄但實際重要的電氣適配差距。已標注 220-240 V / 50 Hz 的冰箱通常比僅標注 220 V 的型號更容易為緬甸準備文件。進口商應在出貨前使銘牌電壓、說明書、檢測報告條件、插頭或電源線組以及質保假設與緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 電網一致。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory as product suitability — appliances must be safe and suitable for Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz supply even where the evidence route is documentary
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory as China domestic design and testing baseline — GB 4706.13 and GB 12021.2 evidence commonly reflects China electrical conditions

source.publisher: Ministry of Electric Power / MEPE-related electricity authorities, Republic of the Union of Myanmar

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Myanmar's 230 V / 50 Hz grid is close to but not identical with China's 220/380 V, 50 Hz baseline. Refrigerators should be labelled and documented for 230 V operation; 220-240 V nameplate ratings are easier to support than 220 V-only markings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 缅甸 230 V / 50 Hz 电网接近但不等同于中国 220/380 V、50 Hz 基线。冰箱应在标签和文件中支持 230 V 运行；220-240 V 铭牌额定值比仅 220 V 标识更容易支持。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 緬甸 230 V / 50 Hz 電網接近但不等同於中國 220/380 V、50 Hz 基線。冰箱應在標籤和文件中支持 230 V 運行；220-240 V 銘牌額定值比僅 220 V 標識更容易支持。
